title: This Week in Stablecoins: TradFi Doesn't Want DeFi. It Wants Blockchain
message_html: This Week in Stablecoins: TradFi Doesn't Want DeFi. It Wants Blockchain ...
snippet: The most important digital asset story this week was not the price of bitcoin, the launch of another cryptocurrency fund or even the continued expansion of stablecoins. It was the widening gap between the parts of crypto that traditional finance wants to preserve and the parts it intends to remove.
